title: Cold front approaching bringing low temperatures
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - According to the...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - According to the South African Weather Service, there is a cold front approaching from the west.

The cold front is expected to make landfall in the early hours of Wednesday 4 September, bringing cooler conditions with light rain along the coast.

Temperatures are expected to drop significantly along the coast. Inland is expected to be warmer during the day.


> Here is what you can expect tomorrow:


- George  12° | 18°
- Knysna  14° | 20°
- Plettenberg Bay  14° | 18°
- Mossel Bay  12° | 18°
- Riversdale  12° | 16°
- Oudtshoorn  12° | 24°
- Graaff-Reinet  13° | 32°

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
